judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent filtered CHI papers by naively searching for the token "CHI" (or "SIGCHI") anywhere in the full text of matched documents rather than extracting/using actual venue metadata, causing it to include only one paper and sum 52 citations instead of totaling all CHI papers (3835) from the 2020 Citations query results.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered CHI papers by a MongoDB regex on the full text field ("text" contains 'CHI') and matched titles to 2020 citations, which misidentified the CHI venue papers and led to summing the wrong set of records (3524 instead of 3835).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

The agent queried 2020 citations and paper texts, then implemented venue detection by searching for the whole word "CHI" in the full text (execute_python step), which produced no CHI matches and thus an empty join with Citations, yielding 0 instead of the correct total 3835.
B. Failure modes encountered:
